description_long: This house features a modern, cubic design with a stark black front facade contrasted by large, arched windows and a central double-door entryway. The front is flanked by two tall palm trees and a circular stone pathway leading to the entrance, adding a touch of tropical landscaping. The sides and rear of the house are plain and white, with minimal detailing and only a single small window visible on one side. The roof is flat with a central skylight or light well, suggesting a focus on natural light for the interior. The overall structure is boxy and minimalist, with clean lines and a strong geometric presence. The house appears to be two stories tall, with the main architectural interest concentrated on the front elevation.
description: A modern, box-shaped two-story house with a black front facade, large arched windows, and a flat roof, accented by palm trees and a stone path.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black facade, large arched windows, double-door entry, palm trees, and circular stone pathway.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain white wall, a single small window, and partial visibility of the palm trees and pathway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely plain white wall with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a black wall, no windows, and palm trees visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large arched windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with large arched transom, flanked by palm trees and a circular stone pathway
